THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ DE ALBA, FRANCISCO D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, JEFF $3,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,940.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT OF CLAIM WAS CREDITED WITH NO AWARD FOR LOSS OF WORK AND AN OFFSET OF $500.00 FOR THE PARTS RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JEFF WU IS GRANTED. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR AUG-30-2018 IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED MEMORANDUM INCLUDED WITH ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL WAS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARK SUTTON VIA COURTCALL. JAMES J. HUANG, ESQ., APPEARED ON BEHALF OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR JEFF WU, ALSO PRESENT. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
